title: sida serrata
intro: Sida serrata, also known as Country Mallow or Bala, is a plant species native to tropical regions, characterized by its serrated leaves and small, greenish-yellow flowers. Traditionally, Sida serrata has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sida serrata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Sida serrata is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tablets, and is also sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
